commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose or repair one canonical redaction approach, and the contributor still needs real output from the actual patched redactor path before merge.; Needs attention: The diff weakens a credential-redaction boundary for Apple/iCloud app-password text in generic structured fields.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve contextual Apple app-password masking — src/logging/redact.ts:95 (sha=bf3ce6eb9a1f0f064f2834c7e8633ceac61ff1c6)
commands.review_summary:
The branch removes generic field names from Apple app-specific password structured-field detection and updates one redaction test to preserve benign kebab-case identifiers while still masking Apple/iCloud-specific fields.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +7. Total +7 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main app-password-scans generic structured fields, while this PR head removes those keys so a value like `error: "iCloud rejected abcd-efgh-ijkl-mnop"` no longer reaches the app-password sweep unless another secret pattern fires.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose or repair one canonical redaction approach, and the contributor still needs real output from the actual patched redactor path before merge.
